title: First Steps in Water Seven
description: The shipwrights deliver devastating news: the Going Merry is too damaged to continue, forcing Luffy toward an impossible captain’s decision.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Iceburg, Kaku, Luffy, Nami, Usopp. The shipwrights deliver devastating news: the Going Merry is too damaged to continue, forcing Luffy toward an impossible captain’s decision.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: I said I won't run anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Chief of sawing and boiling Rob Luchi

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yeah... What a relief! Right, usopp?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What kind of attitude is that!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: But who were those strangely dressed people...?

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Yes. They also work as bounty hunters

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: and attack the pirates who come here.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: They are a trouble- some bunch.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: That's how the frankies do business.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: But they didn't look so tough...

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: You should never underestimate Frankie himself.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Our group's scumbag cost you some problems.

summary: The shipwrights deliver devastating news: the Going Merry is too damaged to continue, forcing Luffy toward an impossible captain’s decision.
